input_description: Train or test CSV files are missing from data/raw/
expected_behavior: Raises FileNotFoundError with helpful message pointing to Kaggle download
reviewer_note: Guard clause exists at lines 83-89. Behavior is defensive but not tested.

expected_behavior: Skips cv2.resize if IMG_SIZE==28, uses reshape only
reviewer_note: Conditional resize at lines 56-61. Edge case for custom IMG_SIZE values.

input_description: Labels in range 10-24 need remapping to 9-23
expected_behavior: Labels >= 10 are decremented by 1 to make classes contiguous
reviewer_note: Comment explains J (9) and Z (25) are skipped. Remapping logic should be tested.

expected_behavior: No hand landmarks detected; prediction skipped; displays 'No hand detected'
reviewer_note: MediaPipe Hands configured with thresholds. If no hand detected, inference path is skipped.

input_description: Bounding box ROI has zero area (hand at edge of frame)
expected_behavior: Skips prediction if roi.size == 0 or roi is empty
reviewer_note: Guard at line 179: 'if roi.size > 0'. Prevents crash on empty crop.

expected_behavior: Letter is not added to text buffer; confidence bar shows low value; box color is orange instead of green
reviewer_note: Condition at line 194 checks confidence threshold before accepting letter.

input_description: Less than LETTER_DELAY_SEC (1.2s) since last accepted letter
expected_behavior: Letter is not accepted even if confident; prevents rapid重复 letters
reviewer_note: Rate limiting at line 195: checks time since last_letter_time.

expected_behavior: Skips cv2.cvtColor to grayscale; outputs 3-channel image
reviewer_note: Conditional at line 49-50 handles CHANNELS config.

expected_behavior: Returns '?' character for unknown prediction indices

input_description: Video file path provided but file does not exist
expected_behavior: Prints error message and exits with sys.exit(1)
reviewer_note: Guard at lines 99-101 checks video file existence.

expected_behavior: Loads data successfully then returns early without training
reviewer_note: Conditional at lines 116-118 implements dry-run mode.

input_description: Model file does not exist at MODEL_PATH
expected_behavior: Raises FileNotFoundError prompting user to run train.py first
reviewer_note: Guard at lines 99-103 checks model existence.

expected_behavior: Builds model architecture with custom input dimensions
reviewer_note: Function accepts input_shape parameter. Architecture scales with input size.

output_type: Expected to rebuild final Dense layer with new class count
reviewer_note: Function accepts num_classes parameter. Should update softmax output layer.
